metadata.title: Raising An Agent Episode - Episode 10
metadata.description:
The Amp editor extension will soon self-destruct. The end of the sidebar is here.

In this episode, Quinn and Thorsten discuss why they think the sidebar and working 1-on-1 with a single assistant isn't the future and how the need for constantly changing and rebuilding is the only way to survive when building developer tooling today.
